title: envdoctor config
description: Schema for .envdoctor.yaml — repo-level overrides, additive checks, and disables for envdoctor's inferred check set. See https://envdoctor.dev/config for the human-readable reference.

schema_version.description: Pins the config schema version. Forever-stable for v0.x.

envdoctor.description: Meta-options for the envdoctor binary itself.

min_version.description: Minimum envdoctor binary version required to read this config. Refuses to load if the running binary is older. Set to a semver string like "0.1.0". Empty or absent means any version.

checks.description: Additive declarative checks. Each check emits at most one Finding when its condition isn't met. Builtin checks emit findings independently — these add to them, they do not replace them.

overrides.description: Modify the parameters of an inferred check without disabling it. Each override targets an inferred check ID (see https://envdoctor.dev/config#inferred-ids).

disable.description: Disable an inferred probe entirely (by probe ID such as "node-version") or one inferred check (by inferred:probe:source[#key] ID — once Phase 4 commit 28+ stable IDs land).

type.description: The check kind. Determines which other fields are meaningful.

reason.description: Why this check exists. Surfaced in Finding evidence so the contributor sees the maintainer's intent.

id.description: The inferred check ID this override targets, e.g. "inferred:node-version:package.json#engines.node".
